title: Mykolaiv: Casualties reported
description: There was a report by the Minister of Internal Affairs, Ihor Klymenko, regarding the tragic road accident in the Mykolaiv region. A truck and a minibus collided on the Mykolaiv-Odesa highway. Unfortunately, as of now, we know about twelve dead. My condolences to family and friends. Six people were injured. All necessary services are working at the scene of the accident: rescuers, police, doctors. Now the law enforcement officers...
description_en: There was a report by the Minister of Internal Affairs, Ihor Klymenko, regarding the tragic road accident in the Mykolaiv region. A truck and a minibus collided on the Mykolaiv-Odesa highway. Unfortunately, as of now, we know about twelve dead. My condolences to family and friends. Six people were injured. All necessary services are working at the scene of the accident: rescuers, police, doctors. Now the law enforcement officers...
description_uk: Була доповідь міністра внутрішніх справ Ігоря Клименка щодо трагічної ДТП в Миколаївській області. На трасі Миколаїв – Одеса зіткнулися вантажний автомобіль і мікроавтобус. На жаль, станом на зараз відомо про дванадцятьох загиблих. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Шість людей травмовано. На місці аварії працюють усі необхідні служби: рятувальники, поліцейські, медики. Зараз правоохоронці...

title: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity,...
title_en: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity,...
title_uk: Українські БПЛА вивели з ладу 42,7% нафтопереробних потужностей Росії,...
description: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_en: Ukrainian UAVs have disabled 42.7% of Russia's oil refining capacity, - General Staff Over the last month, the Defense Forces have defeated 8 Russian refineries and destroyed or seriously damaged more than 60 tanks with oil and oil products. Since August 2025, damage to Russian oil refining has reached $13.5 billion.
description_uk: Украинские БПЛА вывели из строя уже 42,7% мощностей нефтепереработки рф, - Генштаб За последний месяц Силы обороны поразили 8 российских НПЗ и уничтожили или серьезно повредили более 60 резервуаров с нефтью и нефтепродуктами. С августа 2025 года ущерб российской нефтепереработке достиг $13,5 млрд.

title: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this...
title_en: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this...
title_uk: Сьогодні вночі наші українські довгострокові санкції проти Росії за це...
description: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this war worked near St. Petersburg. Ukraine's defense forces hit the port's oil infrastructure, which earns money for the Russian war, and Kronstadt, an important military target, was also hit. The distance from the state border of Ukraine is more than 850 kilometers. Thank you to everyone who provides Ukraine with accuracy and fulfills our plan...
description_en: Tonight, our Ukrainian long-range sanctions against Russia for this war worked near St. Petersburg. Ukraine's defense forces hit the port's oil infrastructure, which earns money for the Russian war, and Kronstadt, an important military target, was also hit. The distance from the state border of Ukraine is more than 850 kilometers. Thank you to everyone who provides Ukraine with accuracy and fulfills our plan...
description_uk: Цієї ночі наші українські далекобійні санкції проти Росії за цю війну спрацювали поблизу Петербурга. Сили оборони України уразили портову нафтову інфраструктуру, що заробляє гроші для російської війни, також були влучання по Кронштадту – важлива військова ціль. Відстань від державного кордону України – понад 850 кілометрів. Дякую всім, хто забезпечує Україні влучність та виконує наш план...

Today, the National Police of Ukraine is not only a law enforcement agency, but also an important component of the Defense Forces. Special thanks to the policemen who, as part of combat units, perform tasks in the most difficult areas of the front, destroy the Russian occupiers and protect our state. Equally important is your...

Особлива подяка поліцейським, які у складі бойових підрозділів виконують завдання на найскладніших ділянках фронту, знищують російських окупантів і захищають нашу державу. title: Kyiv: Missile launch detected
description: Ukrainian missile strike on Russia's Belgorod disrupts power, water supply across city, official says. Ukraine launched an overnight attack on the Russian city of Belgorod and the surrounding region on July 4, striking key infrastructure and causing widespread blackouts, according to eyewitnesses and acting Governor Alexander Shuvaev.

title: Kharkiv: Casualties reported
description: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian airstrike continues in Sumy. The Russians used guided aerial bombs just against ordinary people in the center of the city. There may still be people under the rubble of a high-rise building. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known about four dead, among them - a child. My condolences to family and friends. Another 27 people were injured, six of whom were children. Many have serious injuries. During the day...
description_en: Liquidation of the consequences of the Russian airstrike continues in Sumy. The Russians used guided aerial bombs just against ordinary people in the center of the city. There may still be people under the rubble of a high-rise building. Unfortunately, as of now, it is known about four dead, among them - a child. My condolences to family and friends. Another 27 people were injured, six of whom were children. Many have serious injuries. During the day...
description_uk: У Сумах триває ліквідація наслідків російського авіаудару. Росіяни застосували керовані авіабомби просто проти звичайних людей у центрі міста. Під завалами багатоповерхівки ще можуть бути люди. На жаль, станом на зараз відомо про чотирьох загиблих, серед них – дитина. Мої співчуття рідним і близьким. Ще 27 людей зазнали поранень, з яких шестеро – діти. У багатьох – важкі поранення. Упродовж дня...

title: Crimea: Drone strike
description: Ukraine strikes Russia's Saky air base in occupied Crimea for second time in a week, SBU says. According to the SBU, Ukrainian drones struck seven hangars at the Saky air base where Russia stores Su-30SM, Su-30, and Su-24 fighter and bomber aircraft.

title: Strike confirmed
description: The enemy began to use new tactics: one of the "innovations" is the mass use of reactive UAVs. Probably, this is the first time when they were used in such a quantity, notes the monitoring public eRadar. Reactive UAVs are almost cruise missiles in speed, up to 600 km/h, which makes them difficult targets for small arms and mobile air defense fire groups. On the video - the moment of impact as...
description_en: The enemy began to use new tactics: one of the "innovations" is the mass use of reactive UAVs. Probably, this is the first time when they were used in such a quantity, notes the monitoring public eRadar. Reactive UAVs are almost cruise missiles in speed, up to 600 km/h, which makes them difficult targets for small arms and mobile air defense fire groups. On the video - the moment of impact as...
description_uk: Враг начал применять новую тактику: одним из "нововведений" является массовое использование реактивных БПЛА Вероятно, это первый случай, когда их задействовали в таком количестве, отмечает мониторинговый паблик єРадар. Реактивные БПЛА - по скорости почти крылатая ракета, до 600 км/ч, что делает их сложными целями для стрелкового оружия и мобильных огневых групп ПВО. На видео - момент удара как...

title: Kyiv: Airstrike attack
